_meta.description: Canonical pile mapping for ACT money framework. Maps project_code (ACT-*) to one of: Voice | Flow | Ground | Grants | Other | Uncoded. Used by scripts/sync-money-framework-to-notion.mjs, scripts/backfill-pile-tags.mjs, and any future tool that needs to compute pile.
rules: If income_type='grant', pile=Grants regardless of project_code.
Else, look up project_code in projects map below.
If no match, pile=Other (for known infrastructure codes) or Uncoded (no project_code).
Update this file (not the script) when projects change pile.

piles.Flow: CivicGraph / Goods / JusticeHub / SaaS / retail / commercial scale
piles.Grants: Philanthropic / government / foundation grants (regardless of project)
